rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EMILIA DI FRANCO GLESSI TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Memorandum In Support Of Respondents Second Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Anthony Muschi's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is granted without leave to amend. Petitioners have not presented any evidence that they would be entitled to property from the Trust if Anthony Muschi were disqualified as a beneficiary. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order stating all bases listed in their motions. Any party choosing to contest the Court's tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than March 18, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE G.R. PAUL & S.A. MOORE 2003 TRUST AS AMENDED TRUST
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer to the Amended Petition to Determine Validity of Amendment to Trust and to Impose Constructive Trust, and for Breach of Fiduciary Duty is overruled. Petitioners have alleged sufficient facts to support their claim for breach of fiduciary duty and have alleged sufficient facts that they did not discover the basis for this claim until April 17, 2014. The prevailing party shall submit a proposed order with all grounds cited in their opposition papers for overruling the demurrer. Any party seeking to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 3/18/2015.
